title: Basic Vanish
body:
Lightweight vanish plugin. 

`/vanish` toggles vanish, permission `basicvanish.use`

When vanished:
- No join & quit message
- No advancement message
- BossBar to show you that you're vanished.

## Join Our Discord

For **support**, **updates**, and **community discussion**, join our Discord:
